patterns.evidence: Cursor tends to generate // TODO: implement stubs for complex logic

patterns.description: Component imports React hooks but never calls them
patterns.crossCheck: hook name imported but not called in file body
patterns.evidence: Cursor creates components that import hooks but never use them

patterns.description: API route returns hardcoded mock data array
patterns.evidence: Cursor often generates API routes that return hardcoded mock data

patterns.description: Function with signature but empty/pass/null body
patterns.evidence: Copilot completes function signatures but leaves bodies as pass or return null

patterns.description: Test file only has positive/happy path assertions
patterns.crossCheck: test file has no error/failure/reject/throw test cases
patterns.evidence: Copilot generates test files that only test the happy path

patterns.description: Many imports at top with some unused
patterns.crossCheck: import count > 8 and some imported names not found in file body

patterns.description: References utility function that doesn't exist in codebase
patterns.evidence: Claude generates complete-looking code that references nonexistent utility functions

patterns.description: Config with realistic-looking but placeholder values
patterns.evidence: Claude creates config files with placeholder values that look real

patterns.description: Well-structured file with imports/exports but thin implementation
patterns.crossCheck: file has more import/export lines than logic lines
patterns.evidence: Claude generates complete-looking facades with minimal actual logic

patterns.description: Hardcoded values instead of environment variables
patterns.evidence: GPT generates working code with hardcoded values instead of environment variables

patterns.description: Auth flow that skips token validation
patterns.crossCheck: jwt.decode without jwt.verify in same file
patterns.evidence: GPT creates auth flows that skip token validation
GPT generates debugging console.logs that leak auth data
